title: SalesLine
description: A single point-of-sale sales line from a receipt.

id.description: The unique identifier of the receipt sales line. If a client buys two different cocktails on one receipt, each cocktail is a separate line with a different id.

date.description: The receipt date, in ISO 8601 format.

plu_number.description: The unique POS identifier (price look-up number) of the POS item sold.

title.description: The name of the POS item sold.

quantity.description: How many of the item were sold. May be negative to represent a void or refund line.

total.description: The total for the line in the venue's local currency.
